prompt: I'm building a FastAPI app (Python) and I've never set up CI/CD before. I'm on GitHub. The app has pytest tests and uses PostgreSQL. What do I need to set up and how do I do it?
assertions: Provides a complete GitHub Actions YAML workflow file
Includes a PostgreSQL service container for integration tests
Covers both CI (on PR) and CD (on main merge) stages
Explains how to handle secrets via GitHub Actions secrets
Includes dependency caching to speed up runs
Mentions a deploy step for the CD stage
